feedback.details: Both Mermaid diagrams (C4 container and sequence) pass mmdc validation with exit code 0. Contains explicit container IDs (postgresql-db line 16, qdrant-kb line 17, llm-switch-api line 21) and 10 directed relationships with explicit protocols and ports (postgresql://:5432 line 28, grpc://:6334 line 29, http://:8500 line 30, https://:8200 line 34). database/c2-container.md:11-39,59-87

All 4 required containers present: postgresql-db (line 16), qdrant-kb (line 17), llm-switch-api (line 21), nomad-executor (line 22). Security zones explicitly annotated with Container_Boundary for Database Tier (VPC-private, line 15) and Application Tier (line 20). Consul service discovery (line 25) and Vault secret injection (line 26) properly integrated. Minor deduction: System_Ext for external systems could be explicitly labeled as External System boundary. database/c2-container.md:15-26

Complete traceability matrix at lines 57-66 mapping PRD Section 3.2 (Vector Storage) and 3.3 (Embedding Model Management) to diagram elements. pgvector HNSW index configuration documented (line 59). Qdrant payload schema with embedding_vector, created_at, conversation_id explicitly listed (line 59). Minor deduction: could explicitly document the IVFFLAT alternative index type mentioned in PRD. database/c2-container.md:57-66

Sequence diagram at lines 69-97 covers all 4 required flows: (1) LLM→Qdrant upsert with point ID {conversation_id:timestamp} (line 79), (2) PostgreSQL transaction with advisory lock and explicit ACID guarantee (lines 83-86), (3) Consul health check registration with 30s interval (lines 89-90), (4) Vault dynamic credential retrieval with 15m TTL (lines 93-95). TLS 1.3 mentioned at line 95. database/c2-container.md:69-97

CRITICAL MD013 violations: Line 43 is 921 characters (Mermaid block), lines 47-55 (PRD matrix table) range from 173-212 characters, line 3 is ~260 characters, line 10 is ~220 characters. MD031 violation: Blank line 111 between list items in schema evolution section. These violations are catastrophic and prevent markdownlint strict validation. Code fences use correct language specifiers (mermaid lines 11,69). database/c2-container.md:3,10,43,47-55,111

Flyway migration versioning with V001__initial_schema.sql format documented (line 102) with U001__undo.sql rollback procedures (line 103). PostgreSQL advisory locks (pg_try_advisory_xact_lock) documented (line 104). Qdrant collection versioning via alias documented (line 108). However, the catastrophic rollback procedure (line 110) lacks specific dimension mismatch handling details - should explicitly state the HNSW index rebuild procedure and memory requirements. Connection pool limits (max_connections=100, pool_timeout=30s) documented at lines 105. database/c2-container.md:101-111

Comprehensive security requirements: TLS 1.3 for all database connections (line 115), pg_hba.conf restricting to Nomad executor IPs (line 116), Vault pg_userpass mount with AppRole authentication (lines 118-119), connection pool limits (max_connections=100, pool_timeout=30s line 122), RBAC for read/write on vector embeddings (lines 126-127). Audit logging mentioned (line 128). Minor deduction: should explicitly document certificate rotation intervals for TLS 1.3. database/c2-container.md:113-128

overall_summary: The database/c2-container.md architecture document is substantially complete with valid Mermaid diagrams, comprehensive C4 modeling, and strong PRD traceability. However, it catastrophically fails Markdown Format Compliance (3/10) due to 20+ lines exceeding the 120-character MD013 limit (line 43 is 921 chars, the table at lines 47-55 are 173-212 chars each). This is a critical blocker for production deployment. The Schema Evolution Strategy (8.5/10) needs explicit dimension mismatch handling details for Qdrant catastrophic rollbacks. All other criteria score 9.0+ with Mermaid validation, C4 completeness, PRD traceability, Data Flow specification, and Security Hardening fully compliant with sprint contract requirements. Immediate remediation required: break long lines in the Mermaid blocks and table to meet markdownlint strict configuration before this document can pass sprint contract validation.
